message:
fix: route slot operations through Beads wrapper for proper BEADS_DIR (gt-wrnwq)

Replace runSlotSet/runSlotClear with target.SetHookBead/ClearHookBead in
CreateAgentBead and CreateOrReopenAgentBead. The standalone functions bypassed
BEADS_DIR routing by only setting cmd.Dir, causing slot operations to target
a different database than Show/Update in cross-rig scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
